item.title: Cosyland Children's Tower Stools Recalled Due to Risk of Serious Injury and Death from Entrapment and Fall Hazards; Imported by Cosyland Official
item.company: Online at Amazon.com from April 2021 through November 2025 for around $70.
item.brand: Online at Amazon.com from April 2021 through November 2025 for around $70.
item.summary: This recall involves Cosyland-branded children's tower stools, models CS0003 and CS0092-4. The tower stools were sold in natural bamboo and gray, and measure about 16 inches deep by 18 inches wide and 35 inches tall. "COSYLAND" and warning labels are visible along the top rails.
item.affectedPeople: Consumers who purchased: Cosyland Children's Tower Stools.
item.remedy: Consumers should stop using the recalled tower stools immediately and store them away from children until repaired. Contact Cosyland Official for repair parts, which include protective nets, stabilizing feet, and installation instructions. The firm will mail the repair parts directly to consumers free of charge.
item.payoutAmount: Repair, refund, replacement, or other remedy if stated by the CPSC notice
